mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (recipient_id, type, title, body, link_type, link_id) VALUES (#{recipientId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{body}, #{linkType}, #{linkId})
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId}
